questions.sentence: A technical coding challenge is a common part of the hiring process for frontend developers.
These challenges often involve solving logic problems or building a small feature under a time limit.
To prepare, you should practice common algorithms and data structures using platforms like LeetCode or HackerRank.
During the challenge, focus on writing clean and readable code rather than just finding the fastest solution.
Communicate your thought process clearly if it is a live coding session.
Interviewers value how you think and how you handle difficult problems just as much as your final answer.
